details.desc: Responsible for the primary design of complex architectural projects and urban areas, ensuring harmony between functionality, aesthetics, and sustainability.
Utilizing simulation tools and Building Information Modeling (BIM) to optimize design and construction efficiency
Coordinating and controlling the entire project lifecycle from the conceptual stage to site handover, ensuring technical quality and schedule compliance
Leveraging Big Data and IoT technology to provide scientific evidence for urban planning and management.
Consulting and implementing digital technology roadmaps to enhance productivity and management efficiency.
Engaging in teaching and research at higher education institutions focused on architecture and sustainable urbanism.
